---
name: Legal correction
about: Country data is wrong, out of date, or missing a citation. Lawyers, DPOs, regulator-staff, and legal-savvy developers especially welcome.
title: "[legal] "
labels: legal-correction
---

> By filing this issue you accept the terms in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [DISCLAIMER.md](../../DISCLAIMER.md). You take on no liability for downstream use; the project takes on no liability for your contribution. No professional relationship is created.

## Country / region

ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (e.g. `DE`) and ISO 3166-2 if applicable (e.g. `CA-QC`):

## Field that is wrong

Path within the country data file (e.g. `byContext.lead-magnet.canCollectForMarketing` or `defaults.softOptInScope`):

## Primary-source citation

Statute, regulation, regulator guidance, or court ruling. Link to the primary source. Secondary sources (blog posts, marketing pages, AI-generated summaries) are not acceptable.

- Source:
- URL:
- Quote / clause:

## Why the citation supports the change

A few sentences. Counter-arguments and unsettled-law caveats welcome.

## Are you a qualified lawyer / DPO / privacy practitioner?

(Optional, no obligation to answer.) Helpful context for triage. We do not name you anywhere unless you also file a `lawyerAttestation` PR per CONTRIBUTING.md.
